div.head: The Acting Secretary of State to the Paraguayan Minister (Gondra)
div.p:
Sir: I have the honor to refer to my note of February 7, 1919, relating to the application of the Construction and Engineering Finance Company of New York for a modification of the ruling of
the President of Paraguay which had resulted in the alleged premature termination of the above named Company’s concession for the improvement of the port and river front at Asuncion. I beg to inquire whether you have received any expression of opinion from your Government upon this subject which may be communicated to this Department.
div.closer:
For the Acting Secretary of State:
William Phillips
